\tzpentry{ID4215}{Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4215 introduces Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \tau_c \sim \frac{R^2}{\chi_\perp} \left(\frac{B_{\text{toroidal}}}{B_{\text{poloidal}}}\right)^2 \exp\left(\frac{\mathcal{H}_M}{k_B T}\right) \end{equation}
